About.Description: mLearn is a language learning tool that helps you study through immersion. Watch videos, read manga, and learn vocabulary naturally with intelligent subtitles and spaced repetition.
About.Title: mLearn

CardEditor.AudioUnavailable: Audio not available. Use the regenerate button to generate it.
CardEditor.TtsMissing: {field} not found. Regenerate it from the card editor.
CardEditor.Hint: Translations: comma or newline separated. Pitch accent is mora drop position (0=heiban).
CardEditor.NoCloudAuth: Not authenticated with cloud. Sign in via Settings → Server.

CloudReLogin.CodeHint: Enter the one-time code from the login page.
CloudReLogin.Hint: Click Sign in to open the login page in your browser.

CloudReLogin.Title: Session Expired

Connection.HintLocal: Uses the local Python backend on this machine.
Connection.HintTethered: Connect to the Python backend running on your desktop.

Stats.NoFailedWords: No failed words yet — keep immersing!

Aftermath.NoMistakes: No mistakes were noted. Great job!

Voice.DownloadFailed: Failed to download voice models. The required dependencies may not be installed. Please reinstall the application or check the logs for details.
Voice.EmptyHint: Start a voice call to practice speaking with the AI tutor.
Voice.MicPermission: Microphone access is required for voice calls.
Voice.ModelsRequired: Voice models are required for this feature. Download them to get started.

Personality.CasualDescription: Relaxed, friendly, uses slang and informal language
Personality.Label: Personality
Personality.RoleplayDescription: Custom character with a name and description
Personality.RoleplayLorePlaceholder: Describe the character's personality, traits, and how they should interact...
Personality.RoleplayNamePlaceholder: Enter a name for the character...
Personality.RoleplayQuotesHint: 2-4 short quotes that show different aspects of the character's voice. The AI will match this style.
Personality.FandomUrlHint: The URL of the Fandom wiki for this character's series. Enables the search_fandom tool.

ConversationAgent.ResetConfirm: This will clear the agent's name, personality, and all memories. The setup process will start again. Continue?

Setup.ProfilePhotoHint: Upload an image for this agent's avatar
Setup.Title: Set up your AI tutor
Setup.UserNamePlaceholder: What should the agent call you?
Setup.AboutMeHint: Tell the agent about yourself so it can personalize conversations.
Setup.AboutMePlaceholder: e.g. I'm a university student, I enjoy manga, I've been learning for 6 months...

QuickStart.Hint: Automatically fill roleplay fields by searching a Fandom wiki.
QuickStart.Title: Quick start roleplay character - {name}
QuickStart.FandomUrlHint: Enter the base URL of the Fandom wiki, or just the wiki name (e.g. myheroacademia).
QuickStart.NoResults: No results found. Try a different name or check the wiki URL.
QuickStart.SelectResult: Multiple results found. Select the correct one:
QuickStart.ProgressPointHint: Use a format like 'Chapter 43', 'Episode 30', or type 'all' for the full story.
QuickStart.InvalidProgressPoint: Please use a recognized format like 'Chapter 43', 'Episode 30', a number, or 'all'.

Messages.AnkiConnectionFailed: Could not connect to Anki. Make sure Anki is running with AnkiConnect installed, or disable Anki integration.
Messages.AnkiNoValidCards: Connected to Anki but no valid cards were found. Check your deck and field configuration in settings.
Messages.BackendStopped: The backend server stopped unexpectedly. Please restart the application.
Messages.FileNotFound: A required file was not found. Please try reinstalling the application.
Messages.PermissionDenied: Permission denied. Please check your system permissions or run the application with elevated privileges.
Messages.PortInUse: Another application is using the required port. Please close other instances of mLearn or restart your computer.

ExplainAi.Description: Installs a local LLM Neural Network. Skips ~3 GB of dependencies if left unchecked.
ExplainAi.Title: Install mLearn Explain AI Module

Reader.Description: Installs OCR capabilities for reading manga/images. Skips ~2 GB of dependencies if left unchecked.
Reader.Title: Install mLearn Reader Module

Voice.Description: Installs speech recognition, text-to-speech, and voice cloning. Skips ~4 GB of dependencies if left unchecked.
Voice.Title: Install Voice & TTS Module

Instructions.ChooseComponents: Choose the components you want to install, then click Install.
Instructions.DownloadNote: All downloads are handled automatically. A stable connection is recommended.
Instructions.ForgetSomething: If you forget to install something, delete mLearn and restart the installer again.
Instructions.LanguageUnlocks: Language selection unlocks after setup finishes.

Status.Complete: Installation complete! Choose your language to finish setup.
Status.CouldNotStart: Could not start the installation process.
Status.ErrorOccurred: An error occurred. Check the log below.
Status.LlmWillInstall: Local AI model dependencies will be installed.
Status.OcrWillInstall: OCR reader dependencies will be installed.
Status.VoiceWillInstall: Voice & TTS dependencies will be installed.

KanjiGrid.Description: Colors: learning (orange→yellow), known (green→light-green); unknown (gray). Hover for details.

EmptyState.Description: Characters will appear here as you encounter them in videos and texts.

EmptyState.Title: No tracked characters yet

KanjiGrid.Title: Character Knowledge Overview

CustomColors.Description: Override specific colors that apply globally regardless of theme. Leave empty to use the theme's default color.

ExportAllData.Description: Export all learning data (flashcards, media stats, audio, images) as a ZIP archive
ExportAllData.Label: Export All Data

ExportSettings.Description: Export your settings to a JSON file
ExportSettings.Label: Export Settings

ImportAllData.Confirm: This will overwrite all your current data (flashcards, media stats, audio, images). The app will restart after import. Continue?
ImportAllData.Description: Import all learning data from a ZIP archive. This will overwrite existing data.
ImportAllData.Label: Import All Data
ImportAllData.Success: Data imported successfully. The app will now restart to apply changes.

ImportSettings.Description: Import settings from a JSON file
ImportSettings.Label: Import Settings

ResetSettings.Description: Reset all settings to their default values
ResetSettings.Label: Reset Settings

ImmediateFetch.Description: Fetch word data when subtitles appear
ImmediateFetch.Label: Immediate Fetch

OpenAside.Description: Show a side panel with word translations as subtitles appear
OpenAside.Label: Live Translation Panel

ShowPitchAccent.Description: Display pitch accent information for words

Keybind.Tooltip: Click to record, then press a key to set the keybind

AppLanguage.Description: Select the language for the user interface

LearningLanguage.Description: Select the language you are learning

DevMode.Description: Enable developer tools and debugging features
DevMode.Label: Developer Mode

HoverKnownGetFromDictionary.Description: Fetch dictionary data even for known words
HoverKnownGetFromDictionary.Label: Lookup Known Words

Reader.Description: Configure OCR and manga reader settings

Hide.Description: Cover detected furigana with white boxes that reveal on hover (for reading practice)
Hide.Label: Hide Furigana

AutoSpeak.Description: Automatically read AI tutor responses aloud
AutoSpeak.Label: Auto-speak Responses

Enable.Description: Use AI to explain words and grammar
Enable.Label: Enable LLM Explanations

PassiveWordTracking.Description: Automatically track word familiarity from reading and hovering
PassiveWordTracking.Label: Passive Word Tracking

Speech.Description: Enable text-to-speech for AI responses and speech-to-text input
Speech.Label: Speech (Experimental)

Hotkey.Description: Key to hold to activate the magnifying glass for zooming images
Hotkey.Label: Magnifier Hotkey

Size.Description: Size of the magnifying glass lens in pixels
Size.Label: Lens Size

Zoom.Description: Magnification factor for the magnifying glass
Zoom.Label: Zoom Level

CropPadding.Description: Extra pixels around text when cropping for flashcards
CropPadding.Label: OCR Crop Padding

Enable.Description: Enable optical character recognition for images
Enable.Label: Enable OCR

FuriganaDetection.Description: Detect and filter furigana annotations from OCR results. When disabled, all detected text boxes are shown as-is without furigana filtering.
FuriganaDetection.Label: Furigana Detection

RamSaver.Description: Use lightweight OpenCV-based text detection instead of neural network detection. Reduces memory usage by ~1.5 GB but may lower accuracy on complex layouts. Recognition quality is unaffected.
RamSaver.Label: Ram Saver

TurboMode.Description: Uses faster detection settings. When off, uses higher-resolution detection which is slower but more accurate, especially for vertical text.
TurboMode.Label: Turbo Mode

Reader.Title: Reader

HoverKey.Description: Key to hold while hovering to show word popup
HoverKey.Label: Hover Key

TriggerMode.Description: How word translation popup is triggered in the reader
TriggerMode.Label: Hover Trigger Mode

AddScreenshots.Description: Include screenshots from video and reader in flashcards
AddScreenshots.Label: Add Screenshots

Enable.Description: Source flashcard data from Anki via AnkiConnect. Anki cards take priority over mLearn's built-in cards
Enable.Label: Enable Anki

FieldMapping.Description: Map Anki note fields to mLearn flashcard fields

Expression.Description: The field containing the word or expression
Expression.Label: Expression Field

Meaning.Description: The field containing the definition or meaning
Meaning.Label: Meaning Field

Reading.Description: The field containing the reading or pronunciation
Reading.Label: Reading Field

ModelName.Description: Anki note type to use for new cards
ModelName.Label: Note Type

Preview.NoCard: No cards found for this note type
Preview.Title: Card Preview

AutomaticCreation.Description: Automatically create flashcards from words you encounter while studying
AutomaticCreation.Label: Automatic Flashcard Creation

CreateUnseenCards.Description: Auto-create cards for new words at your target level
CreateUnseenCards.Label: Create Unseen Cards

Enable.Description: Use mLearn's built-in spaced repetition system instead of Anki
Enable.Label: Use mLearn SRS

ExamCardProportion.Description: Percentage of auto-created cards from exam levels (0-1)
ExamCardProportion.Label: Exam Card Proportion

FlipAnimation.Description: Show a 3D flip animation when revealing flashcard answers
FlipAnimation.Label: Card Flip Animation

ForceRecreate.BackendUnavailable: Cannot reach the backend. Make sure the Python server is running.

LLMExamples.Description: Use an LLM to generate example sentences when auto-creating flashcards (requires backend connection)
LLMExamples.Label: Generate Example Sentences

LeechThreshold.Description: Number of lapses before a card is flagged as a leech (0 = disabled)
LeechThreshold.Label: Leech Threshold

PreparedExamLevel.Description: Target proficiency level for auto-created cards
PreparedExamLevel.Label: Target Exam Level

NukeFlashcards.Description: Permanently delete all flashcards and reset everything (cannot be undone!)
NukeFlashcards.Label: Delete All Flashcards
NukeFlashcards.ModalWarning: This will permanently delete all your flashcards, word tracking data, grammar knowledge, daily statistics, and all learning progress. This is irreversible and will restore the flashcard system to its initial empty state, as if the app was freshly installed.

ResetSRS.Description: Clear all flashcard progress (cannot be undone!)
ResetSRS.Label: Reset SRS Data
ResetSRS.ModalWarning: This will reset all flashcard scheduling data including intervals, ease factors, review counts, and learning progress. Your flashcard content will be preserved, but all cards will return to the 'new' state.
ResetSRS.Success: All SRS data has been reset.

MaxNewCardsLearning.Description: Maximum new cards to study per day (-1 = unlimited)
MaxNewCardsLearning.Label: Max New Cards to Learn

MaxReviews.Description: Maximum review cards to study per day (-1 = unlimited)
MaxReviews.Label: Max Reviews Per Day

NewDayHour.Description: Hour at which the SRS day resets (0-23). Cards reviewed before this hour count as the previous day. Default: 4 (4:00 AM)
NewDayHour.Label: New Day Start Hour

UI.ResetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults? This cannot be undone.
UI.Title: Settings

ColourCodes.Description: Colour code words based on their grammatical role
ColourCodes.Label: Part of Speech Colours

ColourKnown.Description: Highlight words you've learned with a distinct colour
ColourKnown.Label: Colour Known Words

KnownColour.Description: Colour used to highlight known words
KnownColour.Label: Known Word Colour

KnownThreshold.Description: Ease value at which a word is considered known
KnownThreshold.Label: Known Threshold

PosColors.Description: Customize the color for each part of speech tag. These colors are used to highlight words in subtitles, the reader, and the conversation agent.

Statistics.Description: Track your progress and learning journey
Statistics.Title: Learning Statistics
